channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: VWFNDR + MBL : voici une application photo Android qui refuse l’IA et signe vos clichés
item.description: Une nouvelle application photo gratuite débarque sur Android avec une promesse à contre-courant : du RAW brut en 16 bits, zéro magie algorithmique, et une signature cryptographique pour prouver que la photo n'a pas été générée par une IA.

item.title: Hypershell X Ultra S Review: The Best Exoskeleton Yet
item.description: With its clever new algorithm, the latest Hypershell exoskeleton powers your legs without making you feel like a puppet on a string.

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Google I/O 2026 was AI all the way down
item.description: Google I/O was AI all the way down, but it's not clear how much will be useful.

item.title: Plex fait exploser le prix de son abonnement à vie
item.description: Aux États-Unis, le prix de l’abonnement Plex Pass à vie va passer de 250 $ à 750 $ à partir du 1er juillet. Il est question d’une augmentation conséquente de 500 $, correspondant à une multiplication par trois du prix. Actuellement, l'abonnement à vie est toujours proposé à 230 € en Europe, mais une hausse similaire pourrait bientôt arriver.

item.title: WhatsApp’s secret new feature will delete texts once you’ve read them — and it could be coming to iOS and Android soon
item.description: WhatsApp is testing a new feature that can automatically delete messages once they’ve been read.

item.title: Credit scores are flawed. FICO has a new model that adds cashflow data. It might just offer the boost you need
item.description: The data company has teamed up with Plaid, a fintech, to offer lenders a better window into the credit health of so-called thin-file consumers. Prices are rising again, and by some measures, consumer sentiment is as low as it’s ever been. That makes it an opportune time for some Americans to perhaps get a boost to their credit scores if they’re able to....

item.title: ‘It’s in the air’: Apple TV’s hottest new shows explore different sides of OnlyFans
item.description: Apple TV is best known for its lineup of science fiction shows and feel-good sitcoms, but of late the streaming service has veered in a different direction. A pair of its current buzziest shows explore the world of OnlyFans creators and cam models, and they're timed up near perfectly; just as one ends (Margo's Got […]

item.title: Spotify’s Listening Stats just had an overdue glow-up, and it’s added more value to one of the platform’s most underrated tools — here's what's new, including a social feature that lets you spy on your friends’ streaming habits
item.description: Spotify updated its Listening Stats tool without telling anyone, and it's packed with a new range of insightful data.

item.title: The Herman Miller Coyl is a very handsome and modular gaming desk
item.description: Legendary furniture maker Herman Miller has made a gorgeous gaming desk that has a price tag you'd expect from the brand.

item.title: Eva Longoria announces a $1 million investment to prove the real value of Latina entrepreneurs
item.description: At Inc. Founders House Los Angeles, the actress and entrepreneur announced a partnership with UCLA. The Eva Longoria Foundation announced a $1 million investment in UCLA’s Latino Policy and Politics Institute (LPPI) to support long-term, data-driven solutions that integrate leadership development and narrative change within Latino communities.

item.title: ‘AI imagineer.’ ‘Design crafter.’ ‘Builder.’ Why design is suddenly full of Frankenjobs
item.description: A new report shows that the design industry is on the cusp of an AI-based role overhaul. Across job listing sites over the past few months, you might have noticed something curious. Alongside traditional titles like “designer,” “engineer,” and “product manager,” a new crop of roles is appearing. They have names like “designer engineer,” “builder,” or “design crafter,” and they represent a tipping point in the design industry that’s just beginning to play out. ...

item.title: Areaware, the shuttered design brand, is getting a second chance
item.description: The puzzle company Piecework is acquiring the beloved home goods brand after it shut down in February. Areaware, the 22-year-old design brand, announced its closure back in February, bidding farewell to its dedicated fan base and selling off the last of its quirky home goods in a series of final sales.

item.title: LinkedIn declares war on AI slop
item.description: The job networking site plans to target low-quality AI posts that distract its users from finding value on the platform. AI is everywhere these days. Try as you might to avoid it, you’re not likely to succeed.

item.title: La recherche de fichiers sur Windows 11 va enfin prioriser vos fichiers locaux
item.description: La recherche sur Windows 11 va très bientôt gagner en pertinence alors que Microsoft vient d'annoncer une nouvelle priorité pour les résultats locaux dans Windows 11. La fonctionnalité est actuellement en test dans la dernière version expérimentale de l'OS.

item.title: Un Ryzen 7 7700X3D à moins de 300 € ? AMD joue la carte du recyclage malin
item.description: AMD travaillerait au lancement d'un nouveau Ryzen 7 7700X3D pour les gamers en quête d'un CPU X3D puissant à prix contenu. Pour ce faire, la firme miserait sur des cœurs Zen 4, des fréquences rabotées, tout en tirant parti de puces « recyclées ».

item.title: 'We’re bringing the watch closer to the rest of the Android family.' Google I/O may have sidelined Wear OS 7, but an important new update is quietly rolling out — and it's all about AI
item.description: Google is adding Gemini Intelligence and more to its wearable OS.

item.title: Is this the future of drive-in movies? Huawei’s XPixel smart headlights can project games, TV and more onto any surface — technology demonstrated at the Beijing Auto Show is the first to offer full-color projection
item.description: These Huawei headlights want to turn your car into a mobile movie theatre

item.title: Google is making Gemini CLI users switch to its new Antigravity 2.0 - so what will it mean for you?
item.description: Google upgrades its Antigravity vibe coding app, says Gemini CLI users need to switch.

item.title: À moins de 13 €, cette batterie externe Xiaomi 10 000 mAh à 3 ports affiche un excellent rapport capacité/prix
item.description: Xiaomi baisse légèrement le prix de sa batterie externe équipée de trois ports, qui offre aussi une capacité maximale de 10 000 mAh et délivre une puissance de 22,5 W. Actuellement, vous pouvez la trouver à 12,99 euros au lieu de 14,99 euros.

item.title: How to Upgrade Weber and Kamado Joe Into Smart Grills
item.description: You don't need to buy a smart grill to make perfect meat. You can buy a dumb grill and send it to school with smart upgrades.

item.title: Infomaniak fait une Bosch : le cloud suisse se rend invendable
item.description: Le fondateur d'Infomaniak cède le contrôle de son entreprise à une fondation d'utilité publique. Dans le cloud, personne n'avait encore osé.

item.title: The new Nothing Headphone (a) is already on sale at Amazon — act fast to save $30
item.description: The Nothing Headphone (a) have hit a new low price of $169 at Amazon. This is 15% off their list price of $199.

item.title: Android 17 is getting its own version of Apple’s Handoff
item.description: Google is adding a new Android feature that resembles Apple's Handoff, allowing you to start a task on your Android phone and continue it right where you left off from a compatible tablet. "Continue On" is designed to eventually be bidirectional, but Google says that at launch it will only support tasks moving from a […]

item.title: Need a compact soundbar upgrade ahead of the World Cup? This four-star Sonos Beam (Gen 2) is now 20% off at Amazon
item.description: The Sonos Beam (Gen 2) is a good-sounding and compact soundbar ideal for many homes. It's on sale now at Amazon.

item.title: Everything to Look for When Buying a New Laptop in 2026
item.description: Shopping for a laptop can be infuriating. Here’s how to sift through the acronyms, storage options, and extra features to find the best one for you.

item.title: Amazfit Bip Max, la montre avec 20 jours d’autonomie pour moins de 100 €
item.description: Amazfit dévoile la Bip Max, une nouvelle montre connectée pensée pour les débutants. Compatible avec 150 modes de sport, elle mise surtout sur son autonomie pouvant atteindre 20 jours, le tout pour moins de 100 €.

item.title: Trump Wants to Be the Hero Vapers Don’t Really Need
item.description: The White House says Trump’s pro-vape stance is based on “gold standard science.” It feels more like vice-signaling to a demographic that often doesn’t vote—over products that are widely available.

item.title: The Boys season 5 ending explained: who dies, is there an end credits scene, and more on the popular Prime Video show's big finale
item.description: The Boys season 5 finale brings the popular Prime Video show to an end — here's what happens to its main characters.

item.title: YouTube may be building different political realities for men and women
item.description: A new study found the platform’s recommendation algorithm steers users toward sharply different political content based on inferred gender. The persuasive power of platforms like YouTube has long been apparent. It’s why the Trump campaign, for instance, bought out the masthead ad space at the top of YouTube 20 times during the 2020 election cycle, including an audacious buyout on Election Day....

item.title: Boîte de réception | Mythes et légendes informatiques (pas toutes fausses)
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on s’attaque à quelques concepts du monde informatique si tenaces qu’ils doivent bien avoir un fond de vérité…

item.title: Bip Max : Amazfit dévoile une montre de sport à 99€ à l’autonomie impressionnante
item.description: Avec sa nouvelle Bip Max, Amazfit frappe un grand coup sur l’entrée de gamme. Pour moins de 100 euros, cette montre de sport casse les codes en intégrant un écran Amoled ultra-lumineux, une autonomie de 20 jours et surtout une cartographie hors ligne, d’ordinaire réservée aux modèles premium.

item.title: How AI search is shifting brand visibility from SEO to data verification
item.description: AI systems are shaping first impressions – inconsistent or unverified data can misrepresent brands before users ever get to click on their site.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel gleefully roasts footage of Trump talking about his $400 million ballroom
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel has reacted to footage of Trump talking to the media about the construction of his new White House ballroom.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Edge of Eternities Play Booster Box is only $145 at Amazon — save $20
item.description: Amazon has the MTG Edge of Eternities Play Booster Box from $143.88, giving you 30 packs for about $4.80 each.

item.title: Cyber attackers have a new favorite, the browser
item.description: AI-fueled browser threats are rising fast, pushing enterprises toward isolation and stronger security strategies.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box is back under $80 at Amazon — save $5 now
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box back under $80, saving you $5.30 on nine booster packs and more.

item.title: Want to feel more hands-on with your files and spreadsheets? You're in luck - Microsoft and Logitech bring extra haptics to your daily work, via your mouse
item.description: Logitech's top-end MX Master 4 mouse is getting Windows 11 Advanced Haptics - so strap in and feel the vibration.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Ascended Heroes Mega Meganium ex Box is on sale at Amazon — save nearly $10
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Mega Meganium ex Box for $68.99, saving you $8.96 on four Ascended Heroes packs and the titular promo cards.

item.title: Android Auto va totalement changer de look : voici les premières applis compatibles
item.description: Android Auto va faire évoluer son interface pour laisser plus de liberté visuelle aux applications, à commencer par Spotify et YouTube Music.

item.title: Daily Shows Ronny Chieng breaks down Trumps $1.8 billion slush fund
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice awarded Donald Trump a taxpayer-financed $1.8 billion fund and "The Daily Show" has thoughts.
